field_notes.scale_lock: Literal product scale and silhouette lock for prompt/runtime enforcement.
field_notes.label_lock: Literal label and readable identity preservation rule.
field_notes.on_the_fly_flags: Operator-controlled runtime overrides that cannot violate product truth.

BOSMAX_SERUM_5ML.product_name: BOSMAX Serum 5ML / BOSMAX HERBS Herbal Oil Roll On
BOSMAX_SERUM_5ML.product_truth_ref: Tiny slim matte-black cylindrical roll-on bottle, glossy black cap, white BOSMAX HERBS wordmark, leaf icon, and Herbal Oil Roll On label.
BOSMAX_SERUM_5ML.scale_lock: Bottle stays at exactly lip balm size — small enough to fit into the fingers naturally and read as a tiny handheld roll-on. It is the smaller BOSMAX variant and never grows toward the larger variant; never drift into perfume, spray, supplement, skincare, or oversized bottle form.
BOSMAX_SERUM_5ML.label_lock: Keep BOSMAX HERBS wordmark, leaf icon, and Herbal Oil Roll On label readable and unchanged.
safety_notes: No perfume, spray, supplement, or skincare bottle drift.
BOSMAX_SERUM_5ML.cta_text_default: Tap to add one to your daily kit.

BOSMAX_HERBS_10ML.product_name: Bosmax Oil 10 ML / BOSMAX HERBS 10ml Herbal Oil Roll On
BOSMAX_HERBS_10ML.product_truth_ref: Slim matte-black cylindrical roll-on / oil bottle, glossy black cap, printed BOSMAX identity as it appears on the real product; larger than the smaller BOSMAX roll-on variant yet still a small palm-scale roll-on. Preserve the product's own real printed label exactly and do not borrow, swap in, or morph the smaller-variant label.
BOSMAX_HERBS_10ML.scale_lock: Bottle stays at exactly chapstick size — it fits into the fingers naturally and reads as a slim handheld roll-on, the larger BOSMAX variant, slightly bigger than the smaller variant yet still small and palm-sized; never drift into perfume, spray, supplement, skincare, or oversized bottle form, and never shrink to the smaller-variant scale.
BOSMAX_HERBS_10ML.label_lock: Preserve the real printed BOSMAX label identity exactly; do not swap in, borrow, or morph the smaller-variant label.
safety_notes: No perfume, spray, supplement, or skincare bottle drift.
Do not present as the smaller BOSMAX variant.
BOSMAX_HERBS_10ML.cta_text_default: Tap to add one to your daily kit.

MWTCB_25ML_CAP_BURUNG.product_truth_ref: Short compact transparent green glass bottle of the small flat traditional medicated-oil class — a flat-front glass herbal-oil bottle in the traditional pocket-size minyak-angin bottle family, never a cylindrical, round-bodied, tall, perfume, syrup, supplement, or cosmetic bottle — with a flat-front, rectangular compact impression, short neck and compact shoulders, green herbal oil inside, short red ribbed screw cap, cream label panel, teal to deep green border, gold ornamental border, bird illustration, and traditional heritage label identity with readable Cap Burung text preserved where visible.
MWTCB_25ML_CAP_BURUNG.scale_lock: Bottle stays at exact compact palm-size herbal-oil scale. It fits naturally in one hand, with fingers wrapping comfortably around the body, and reads as a small handheld household herbal-oil bottle. It is only slightly larger than a chapstick-size roll-on and remains in the same compact handheld size family. Never enlarge it into a tall perfume, supplement, syrup, spray, cosmetic, or oversized medicine bottle. Never upscale it to dominate the hand, the face, or the frame. Keep the bottle at a natural handheld depth plane and do not place it much closer to the camera lens than the presenter's face or hand.
MWTCB_25ML_CAP_BURUNG.label_lock: Preserve Minyak Warisan Tok Cap Burung and Cap Burung heritage label identity, bird illustration, cream label panel, teal to deep green border, gold ornamental border, traditional typography, and all readable label text.
safety_notes: No clinically proven claim unless source-proven.
No claim that product is universally safe for babies unless legally or source verified.
